note: Analysis plan and decision rule frozen before computation (geo15-style). Thresholds are project-management rules, not preregistered criteria. Seed labels follow the project's date-like naming convention; they are labels, not timestamps.
label: TEST 3: local-flatness stress simulation
design: x~Exponential(scale=r*g), grids g in {10,100}, curvature ratios r in {0.5,1,2,5,10,50}; plus zero-inflated Poisson(lambda=30, 60% zeros) on g=10; N=40000 per cell
measures: post-de-round dL1 residual (does the reduction absorb it)
adequacy_rule: local flatness adequate at ratio r iff |quotient dL1 residual| < 2 null SE; name failure regimes and bias direction below that
